payload.description: NYCT and MTA Bus operate all subways and buses in New York City
North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000-square-mile travel area

payload.title: Assistant Chief Officer, Safety Operations Department of Buses
payload.description: Dedicated Bus employee with over 32 years of experience. Responsible for the Zero Emission Bus Training Program and the Oversight & Development Unit.

payload.title: Director, Transportation Safety & Training Department of Buses
payload.description: Director of Training for new bus operators at Zerega Bus facility. Began career as a bus operator more than 25 years ago. Helped pioneer Bustrek software tool.

payload.title: General Superintendent, Safety & Environmental Management Department of Buses
payload.description: General Superintendent of Safety in Buses, working to improve bus safety and employee availability.

payload.title: General Superintendent of Transportation Department of Buses
payload.description: Integral for installation of fast charging systems (autonomous pantograph dispensers) at Herkimer lot in East New York Depot for zero-emissions bus fleet.

payload.title: Principal Transportation Planner Department of Buses
payload.description: Principal Transportation Planner, responsible for high-level priorities for Senior Vice President including monthly email message that celebrates employee achievements and reports depot performance.

payload.title: Train Operator Department of Subways
payload.description: Train operator on the 7 line who rescued a person on the elevated structure between 82 St and 90 St stations.

payload.title: Superintendent Department of Subways
payload.description: Superintendent who worked on OMNY and fare payment systems for the past 25 years. Critical to the Wide Area Gate (WAG) project.

payload.title: Cleaner
payload.description: Cleaner in Subways' Stations Environment sub-division. Recognized for bravery in restraining an attacker at 116 St subway station.

payload.title: Senior Director, Subways Coordination & Solutions Department of Subways
payload.description: Manages fare compliance initiatives for the Department of Subways. Works on initiatives aimed at decreasing fare evasion.

payload.title: Maintenance Supervisor II Department of Subways
payload.description: Began at NYCT in 1998 as a signal maintainer. Instrumental in testing and design upgrades of the Wide Area Gate (WAG) and delayed egress for Emergency Gates.

payload.title: Manager, Fraud Detection Paratransit
payload.description: Manager in Paratransit's Fraud Detection Unit. Success in fraud prevention across Access-A-Ride. Implemented methods to prevent E-Hail fraud.
Fraud detection unit within Paratransit, focused on fraud prevention across Access-A-Ride
Transit All-Stars May 2024 employee recognition program honoring outstanding NYCT employees
A man slashed an 11-year-old girl on the sidewalk at street level then fled into the 116 St subway station; Mario Barber helped restrain the attacker until police arrived

tool_args.label: Rescue on 7 line between 82 St and 90 St

payload.description: Train operator Dexter Renee rescued a person who was on the elevated structure between 82 St and 90 St stations on the 7 line

extra_fields.location: 7 line between 82 St and 90 St stations

tool_args.label: IOD reduction >50% at East New York Depot

payload.description: Reduction in injury on duty incidents (IOD) at East New York Depot

Committee of the MTA Board of Directors. Chair: Haeda Mihaltses. Members: Andrew Albert, Samuel Chu, Dan Garodnick, David Jones, Meera Joshi, John Ross 'JR' Rizzo, John Samuelson, Lisa Sorin, Midori Valdivia.

payload.claim_text: New York City Transit and MTA Bus operate all subways and buses in New York City. Our 45,000 employees serve 4,500,000 passengers a day. We operate nearly 6,700 subway cars and 5,800 buses, and we maintain 472 subway stations, 640 miles of track, 28 bus depots and 70 shops and yards.
payload.subject: NYCT

payload.claim_text: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority is North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000-square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.
payload.subject: MTA

payload.description: Conductor who reported Dexter Renee's rescue to management
